title: tui-translator QA8-05 Soak Runner v2 Artifact Schema (partial)
description: Schema for the QA8-05 (issue #503) partial 8-hour soak runner v2 evidence artifact emitted by `cargo run --bin run_soak -- --smoke ...` and (in the full closure of #503) by the live 8-hour run. This schema is strictly additive over `verification-evidence/qa8/QA8-03-soak-schema-v2.json`: every field documented there for v2 evidence remains readable, and this schema codifies the QA8-05-owned blocks (fault_injection, crash_watch, sample_windows, backpressure_snapshots). Each entry in `backpressure_snapshots` MUST itself validate against `verification-evidence/qa8/QA8-07-backpressure-telemetry.schema.json` (`qa8-07.v1`). The full 8-hour green soak per platform remains hardware/time-gated and is recorded under `blocked_gates` until #503 is closed.

schema_version.description: QA8-05 evidence-schema version. v2 = QA8-03-compatible base + QA8-05 runner-owned blocks.

run_id.description: Stable identifier for this soak run. Smoke artifacts use a deterministic id derived from the inputs (e.g. `qa8-05-smoke-600s-30s-4events`); live 8-hour runs use a unix-epoch or UUID string.

synthetic.description: True when the artifact was assembled without spawning the real `tui-translator` binary. All smoke artifacts are synthetic; live 8-hour runs MUST report false.

smoke.description: True when produced via `--smoke` (deterministic schedule, no real wall-clock soak).

started_at_utc.description: RFC3339 UTC start timestamp. Smoke artifacts pin this to the UNIX epoch for byte-stable check-in.

finished_at_utc.description: RFC3339 UTC finish timestamp. Smoke artifacts equal `started_at_utc`; `duration_secs` is authoritative.

duration_secs.description: Soak wall-clock duration in seconds. Smoke 10-minute artifact: 600.

sample_interval_secs.description: Per-sample interval in seconds. Driven by `--sample-secs`.

sample_windows.description: Rolling-window aggregates of per-sample metrics. Each window covers `window_secs` seconds (default 60s) and partitions `[0, duration_secs)`.

backpressure_snapshots.description: Sequence of backpressure-telemetry snapshots consumed from the runtime (#505 / PR #540 / PR #545). Each entry MUST conform to `qa8-07.v1` and SHOULD set `provenance.synthetic = true` when produced by the partial runner.

limitations.description: Explicit machine-readable list of what this artifact does NOT prove. Smoke artifacts MUST include at least one entry; downstream gates SHOULD refuse to count smoke evidence as 8-hour green-soak proof.

blocked_gates.description: Gates that block full #503 closure. The `8h_green_soak` entry MUST remain until a real 8-hour run per platform is recorded.

partial.description: True when the artifact represents a partial slice of #503; false only when the full 8-hour run has been recorded.

contains_fault.description: True when at least one fault-injection event overlaps this window.

simulated.description: True when the event was recorded without real actuation (smoke mode).
